candidates.name: Satellite Fall
candidates.description: Orbital infrastructure collapses, plunging districts into rolling blackouts and signal wars.

candidates.name: Meme Plague
candidates.description: Narratives spread like infection, causing unstable markets and chaotic faction messaging.

candidates.name: Fork War
candidates.description: Rival chains and factions battle for ideological and territorial dominance across Block Topia.

candidates.name: New Dawn
candidates.description: A temporary calm as factions rebuild, focusing on expansion and large-scale murals.
